title: hoya curtisii subsp. curtisii
intro: Hoya curtisii subsp. curtisii, also known as Hoya curtisii, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to the Philippines. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Hoya curtisii subsp. curtisii include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
